name: synastry
description: HR compatibility analysis using natal chart context and pluggable AI providers.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @synastry/shared && npm run build --workspace @synastry/api && npm run build --workspace @synastry/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @synastry/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @synastry/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @synastry/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @synastry/shared
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @synastry/shared && npm run test --workspace @synastry/shared && npm run test --workspace @synastry/api && npm run test --workspace @synastry/web
scripts.test:run: npm run build --workspace @synastry/shared && npm run test:run --workspace @synastry/shared && npm run test:run --workspace @synastry/api && npm run test:run --workspace @synastry/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @synastry/shared && npm run lint --workspace @synastry/api && npm run lint --workspace @synastry/web
